info.title: Warehouse Inventory Quality Service API
info.description: REST API for warehouse inventory and quality management including items, lots, transactions, and quality inspections

get.summary: Get inventory lot by ID
Get inventory item by ID

post.description: Uploads scan events collected offline by RF mobile device. Supports idempotent processing using event IDs to prevent duplicates. Records all barcode scans, task starts/completions, and location scans for audit trail.
Verifies item on RMA, checks return window, evaluates condition for restocking. Calculates refund amount, suggests return location.

post.summary: Validate item barcode scan against ASN
Validate item scan with enriched product and location details
post.description: Returns enriched validation response with product details and suggested locations

post.summary: Validate ASN barcode scan (READ-ONLY - no state changes)

post.description: Creates GRN from ASN and initiates receiving. This is the commit point where: 1) GRN is created from ASN with RECEIVING status, 2) ASN status → IN_RECEIVING, 3) Events published: GrnCreatedEvent, ReceivingStartedEvent, AsnStatusChangedEvent

post.summary: RF scan and receive - Creates LPN and inventory
post.description: Manhattan WMS aligned: Creates LPN and inventory at the moment of RF scan

post.summary: Complete QC inspection for received LPN

post.description: Loads inspection checklist based on product/supplier, creates inspection record. Returns checklist items with photo/measurement requirements.
Confirms picker is at the correct location for the picking task

post.summary: Substitute an item when original is not available

post.description: Assigns task to user and transitions to IN_PROGRESS status
Reports shortage when actual inventory is less than expected

post.summary: Confirm multiple item barcodes for batch picking

post.description: Records picked quantity and updates task status to COMPLETED

post.summary: Handle multiple picks in a single operation
post.description: Batch picking operations for multiple items to improve efficiency
Execute LPN operations (create, move, split, consolidate, close, reopen)

Validate that the scanned LPN matches the transfer request and is at the expected source location. Checks LPN status (must be STORED), location match, and hold status. Returns detailed validation errors if checks fail.

404.description: Transfer request or LPN not found

post.description: Validate that the scanned destination location is valid for the transfer. Checks location existence, capacity availability, and block status. Returns detailed validation errors if checks fail.

404.description: Transfer request or location not found

post.description: Complete the transfer by updating LPN location and publishing INVENTORY_TRANSFERRED event. Requires prior validation of source LPN and destination location. Returns transfer completion details and performance metrics.

400.description: Invalid request - Source or destination not validated

post.description: Submits cycle count results, validates variance, creates adjustments, and triggers approval workflow if needed
Searches product by barcode (UPC, EAN, SKU), aggregates quantities, returns lot/expiry for FEFO items, includes substitutes/cross-references.
Apply or release inventory hold

Uploads evidence file from RF mobile device for damage reports, variance documentation, quality issues, etc. File content should be base64 encoded. Supports images (JPEG, PNG) and documents (PDF). Automatically generates thumbnails for images.

Submits the cycle count results from RF device. System will detect variances, create adjustments if needed, and determine if supervisor review is required. Supports both BLIND and DIRECTED count modes.

409.description: Task already completed or not in valid state

post.description: Execute bulk operations across multiple modules (BULK_ASSIGN, BULK_COMPLETE, BULK_CANCEL, BULK_PRINT)
Marks inspection as IN_PROGRESS and records start time. Optionally assigns user.
Marks inspection as COMPLETED with results. Sets status to COMPLETED, records completion time, and inspection results.

post.summary: Complete quality inspection with line-level details
post.description: Completes inspection with detailed line-by-line QC results. Updates GRN line QC status, triggers putaway task generation event for passed items.
Automatically creates a quality inspection for a received GRN. Typically called by workflow automation when GRN reaches RECEIVED status.

post.summary: Create a new quality inspection result

get.summary: Get all purchaseorderlines
Get all picking waves

post.description: Reorders tasks within the wave for maximum efficiency using zone clustering and path optimization
Automatically generates picking waves by grouping orders based on priority, delivery dates, and workload balancing

get.summary: Get all picking tasks

post.description: Report that requested quantity is not available at the location. Creates discrepancy record and adjusts task.

post.summary: Confirm barcode scan and update picked quantity
post.description: Validates barcode and updates the picked quantity for a picking task. Automatically updates task status based on completion.

post.summary: Complete a picking task and deduct inventory
Create NCR from failed quality inspection

get.summary: Get all laborshifts
Get all inventoryreservations
Get all inventorycountlines
Get all inventoryadjustmentlines
Get inventory transactions

post.summary: Create inventory transaction for putaway task completion
post.description: Creates inventory transaction and updates inventory when a putaway task is completed. This adds the received quantity to the destination location.

get.summary: Get all inventory transactions

post.summary: Record count results for a cycle count
Prepare blind count (hide system quantities from counter)
Create control group count for accuracy verification
Create spot check count for random verification
Create opportunity count during normal operations
Create variance investigations for completed count
Create a new cycle count with count lines
Process count adjustments and create approval requests
Allocate inventory for a sales order using FIFO logic
Approve an inventory adjustment and execute it

get.summary: Get all goodsreceiptlines

post.description: Record received quantities for a single GRN line. Updates receivedQuantity, damagedQuantity, and lot/expiry details. Auto-checks if all lines are received and transitions GRN to RECEIVED status if complete.

post.summary: Create a GRN with all its line items in a single request

get.summary: Get all goodsreceiptitems
Get all goods receipts

post.description: Transitions GRN from ARRIVED to RECEIVING status. Indicates the receiving process has started.
Transitions GRN from RECEIVED or PARTIAL to INSPECTION_IN_PROGRESS status. Indicates quality inspection has started.

Record received quantities for multiple GRN lines in one transaction. Updates receivedQuantity, damagedQuantity, and lot/expiry details for specified lines. Auto-transitions GRN from RECEIVING to RECEIVED when all lines are recorded.
Transitions GRN from RECEIVING to RECEIVED status. Indicates all expected goods have been received.
Transitions GRN from RECEIVING to PARTIAL status. Indicates only some goods have been received.
Transitions GRN from INSPECTION_IN_PROGRESS to INSPECTED status. Indicates inspection is complete.
Transitions GRN from INSPECTED to COMPLETED status. Triggers automatic putaway task creation.
Transitions GRN from CREATED to ARRIVED status. Indicates goods have physically arrived at the facility.

Completes the quality inspection process for a GRN in INSPECTED status. If inspection PASSES or CONDITIONALLY_PASSES, GRN status advances to COMPLETED (triggers putaway). If inspection FAILS, GRN remains in INSPECTED status.

post.summary: Complete quality inspection with line-level results
post.description: Completes quality inspection with detailed line-level QC results, quantities, and disposition actions. Updates both header and line-level QC fields. Creates audit trail events for each line. If all lines PASS, GRN advances to COMPLETED and triggers putaway generation. @deprecated Use /api/v1/quality-inspections/{id}/complete-with-details instead.
Transitions GRN to CANCELLED status from any non-terminal state. This is an emergency escape transition.
Automatically creates a Goods Receipt (GRN) from an Advance Shipping Notice (ASN). ASN must be in ARRIVED status. Creates GRN header and lines from ASN data.

get.summary: Get all advance shipping notices

post.summary: Create a new advance shipping notice
Create ASN with lines and auto-create GRN
post.description: Creates ASN with line items in a single request. Also creates a corresponding GRN in PENDING status with equivalent lines.

post.summary: Create ASN with lines WITHOUT auto-creating GRN
post.description: Creates ASN with line items in a single request. Does NOT create GRN - GRN will be created later when RF receiving starts.

post.summary: Create a new inventory on-hand record

patch.summary: Update task counts for a picking wave
Update quantity picked for a task

patch.description: Updates GRN status. Setting status to COMPLETED triggers automatic putaway task creation within 5 seconds.
Updates ASN status. Setting status to ARRIVED triggers automatic GRN creation within 5 seconds.

patch.summary: Update quantities for an inventory on-hand record

id.description: Unique identifier for the quality inspection

facilityId.description: ID of the facility this inspection belongs to

description.example: Quality inspection for electronics shipment from vendor ABC

productId.description: ID of the product being inspected

lotId.description: ID of the inventory lot being inspected

samplingPlanJson.description: JSON definition of the sampling plan

assignedToUserId.description: ID of the user assigned to perform the inspection

scheduledDate.description: Date when the inspection is scheduled

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the inspection was completed

totalPassedItems.description: Number of items that passed inspection

totalFailedItems.description: Number of items that failed inspection

notes.example: Minor cosmetic defects found but within acceptable limits

QualityInspection.description: Quality inspection entity for warehouse management

id.description: Unique identifier for the picking task

facilityId.description: ID of the facility this picking task belongs to

taskName.description: Human-readable name for the picking task

description.description: Detailed description of the picking task
description.example: Pick 5 units of Product ABC from location A-01-01

orderId.description: ID of the order this task is associated with

orderLineId.description: ID of the specific order line item

allocationId.description: ID of the inventory allocation for this task

waveId.description: ID of the picking wave this task belongs to

productId.description: ID of the product to be picked

lotId.description: ID of the specific inventory lot to pick from

lotNumber.description: Lot number for display and tracking

lpnId.description: LPN (License Plate Number) ID to pick from

quantityToPick.description: Quantity that needs to be picked

quantityPicked.description: Quantity that has already been picked

uomId.description: ID of the unit of measure for the quantities

fromLocationId.description: ID of the storage location to pick from

toLocationId.description: ID of the location to deliver picked items to

assignedToUserId.description: ID of the user assigned to perform this task

status.description: Current status of the picking task

priority.description: Priority level of the task (lower number = higher priority)

holdReason.description: Reason code when task is ON_HOLD

createdDate.description: Date when the task was created

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the task was completed

notes.description: Additional notes about the picking task

PickingTask.description: Picking task entity for warehouse management

id.description: Unique identifier for the goods receipt line

facilityId.description: Identifier of the facility where the goods were received

asnLineId.description: Reference to the ASN line that originated this receipt line (for traceability)

productId.description: Identifier of the product on this line

expectedQuantity.description: Expected quantity of the product for this line

receivedQuantity.description: Actual quantity of the product received for this line

uomId.description: Unit of measure identifier for the quantities on this line

lotNumber.description: Lot number received for this line, if applicable

expiryDate.description: Expiry date of the received lot, if applicable

serialNumbersJson.description: JSON array of received serial numbers for this line, if applicable

lineStatus.description: Line lifecycle status: OPEN, RECEIVED, INSPECTING, INSPECTED, PUTAWAY_PENDING, PUTAWAY_DONE, CANCELLED

varianceType.description: Variance classification: NONE, DAMAGED, SHORT, OVER (orthogonal to lifecycle)

qcStatus.description: QC attribute: NOT_REQUIRED, PENDING, PASSED, FAILED (orthogonal to lifecycle)

qcResult.description: Line-level QC outcome: PENDING, PASSED, FAILED, CONDITIONAL_PASS, NOT_REQUIRED

qcFailureReason.description: Detailed reason for QC failure if qcResult = FAILED

qcInspectedQuantity.description: Quantity actually inspected (may be sample or full)

qcPassedQuantity.description: Quantity that passed QC and can be put into available inventory

qcFailedQuantity.description: Quantity that failed QC (damaged, defective, non-conforming)

dispositionAction.description: Action taken for failed/quarantined items: ACCEPT, REJECT, QUARANTINE, RETURN_TO_VENDOR, REWORK, DESTROY

rejectedQuantity.description: Quantity rejected and not accepted into inventory

notes.description: Additional notes for the goods receipt line

receiptItemId.description: Unique identifier for the goods receipt item

facilityId.description: Identifier of the facility where the item was received

uomId.description: Unit of measure identifier for the received quantity

lotNumber.description: Lot number for this specific item batch, if applicable

serialNumbersJson.description: JSON array of serial numbers for this specific item batch, if applicable

conditionStatus.description: Condition status of the received item

temporaryLocationId.description: Identifier of the temporary location where received items are initially placed

id.description: Unique identifier for the exception comment

facilityId.description: ID of the facility this comment belongs to

exceptionId.description: ID of the exception this comment is related to

commentText.example: Issue has been resolved by updating inventory levels

commentedByUserId.description: ID of the user who made this comment

commentedAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was made

isInternal.description: Whether this comment is for internal use only

ExceptionComment.description: Exception comment entity for warehouse management

lotId.description: Unique identifier for the inventory lot

ownerClientId.description: ID of the client who owns this inventory lot (for 3PL operations)

receivedDate.description: Date when the lot was received

receivedQuantity.description: Total quantity received in this lot

remainingQuantity.description: Remaining quantity available in this lot

status.description: Current status of the inventory lot

id.description: Unique identifier for the inventory item

ownerClientId.description: ID of the client who owns this inventory (for 3PL operations)

uomId.description: ID of the unit of measure

status.description: Current status of the inventory item

grnLineId.description: Link to GRN line that created this LPN

assignedShipmentId.description: Outbound shipment this LPN is assigned to

assignedLoadId.description: Load this LPN is assigned to for dispatch

stagedAt.description: When LPN was staged at dock door

stagingLocationId.description: Storage location where LPN is staged

loadedAt.description: When LPN was loaded onto truck

LicensePlateNumber.description: License Plate Number - Physical container tracking entity

primaryUomId.description: ID of the primary unit of measure

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

requiresTemperatureControl.description: Whether the product requires temperature control

requiresLightControl.description: Whether the product requires light control

requiresHumidityControl.description: Whether the product requires humidity control

isHazardous.description: Whether the product is hazardous material

trackExpiry.description: Whether to track expiration dates for this product

abcAnalysisClass.description: ABC analysis classification (A, B, or C)

defaultCycleCountFrequencyDays.description: Default cycle count frequency in days

imageGalleryUrlsJson.description: JSON array of additional product image URLs

id.description: Unique identifier for the storage location

facilityId.description: ID of the facility this location belongs to

clientId.description: Client/customer ID for client-based segregation (null = shared location)

zoneId.description: ID of the warehouse zone this location belongs to

rackRowId.description: ID of the rack row this location belongs to (denormalized for query performance)

bayId.description: ID of the bay this location belongs to

levelId.description: ID of the rack level this location belongs to

bayNumber.description: Bay number within the rack level

locationName.description: Human-readable name of the storage location

locationCode.description: Unique code identifier for the storage location

description.description: Detailed description of the storage location
description.example: Standard pallet location with easy access

length.description: Length of the storage location in meters

width.description: Width of the storage location in meters

height.description: Height of the storage location in meters

maxWeight.description: Maximum weight capacity of the location in kg

maxVolume.description: Maximum volume capacity of the location in cubic meters

allowedProductCategoriesJson.description: JSON array of allowed product categories for this location

allowedProductAttributesJson.description: JSON object of allowed product attributes

allowedStorageConditionsJson.description: JSON object of allowed storage conditions

isActive.description: Whether this storage location is currently active

isBlocked.description: Whether this storage location is currently blocked

isReserved.description: Whether this storage location is currently reserved

blockReason.description: Reason why the location is blocked

pickSequenceNumber.description: Sequence number for pick path optimization

travelDistanceFromDock.description: Distance from dock in meters for routing optimization

lastPickedAt.description: Timestamp when this location was last picked from

qrCodeData.description: QR code data for mobile scanning

labelPrintedAt.description: Timestamp when location label was last printed

StorageLocation.description: Storage location entity representing individual storage positions

StartReceivingRequest.description: Request to start receiving process for an ASN

ScanAndReceiveRequest.description: Request for RF scan and receive

ReceivingResponse.description: Response after RF scan and receive

lineResults.description: Detailed results for each GRN line

CompleteInspectionDetailedRequest.description: Request to complete QC inspection with detailed line-level results

grnLineId.description: ID of the GRN line being inspected

result.description: QC result for this line: PASSED, FAILED, CONDITIONAL_PASS

disposition.description: Action for failed/damaged items: ACCEPT, REJECT, QUARANTINE, RETURN_TO_VENDOR, REWORK, DESTROY

failureReason.description: Detailed failure reason if result = FAILED

notes.example: Minor cosmetic defects acceptable for B2B sales

LineInspectionResult.description: Inspection result for a single GRN line

productId.description: Identifier of the product on this line

uomId.description: Unit of measure identifier for the quantities on this line

expectedQuantity.description: Expected quantity of the product for this line

receivedQuantity.description: Actual quantity of the product received for this line

damagedQuantity.description: Quantity of damaged product received for this line

receiptId.description: Identifier of the goods receipt this line belongs to

lotNumber.description: Lot number received for this line, if applicable

expiryDate.description: Expiry date for this line, if applicable

serialNumbersJson.description: JSON array of received serial numbers for this line, if applicable

notes.description: Additional notes for the goods receipt line

GoodsReceiptLineCreateRequest.description: Request DTO for creating a goods receipt line

ReceiveLineRequest.description: Request to record receipt for individual GRN line

productId.description: Identifier of the product on this line

lotNumber.description: Lot number for this line item

expiryDate.description: Expiry date for this line item

notes.description: Additional notes for this line item

GoodsReceiptLineItem.description: Line item for a goods receipt

receiptNumber.description: Unique receipt number for the GRN

vendorId.description: Vendor ID - required if not inbound for client

inboundForClientId.description: Client ID for inbound - required if not from vendor

lineItems.description: List of line items for the GRN

GoodsReceiptWithLinesRequest.description: Request DTO for creating a Goods Receipt (GRN) with its line items

lineItems.description: List of all line items associated with this GRN

GoodsReceiptWithLinesResponse.description: Response DTO containing a Goods Receipt (GRN) with all its line items

lineId.description: ID of the GRN line being recorded

receivedQuantity.description: Actual quantity received for this line

LineReceiptRecord.description: Receipt record for a single GRN line

notes.description: Additional notes for the receipt recording
notes.example: All items received in good condition

RecordReceiptRequest.description: Request to record received quantities for GRN lines in bulk

id.description: Unique identifier for the cycle count task

facilityId.description: Facility ID where count is to be performed

assignedToUserId.description: User ID assigned to perform the count

latitude.description: GPS latitude where count was performed

longitude.description: GPS longitude where count was performed

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when record was last updated

updatedBy.description: User who last updated the record

CycleCountTask.description: Cycle count task for physical inventory verification

inboundForClientId.description: Client ID for whom this inbound is for
